title: scrophularia regelii
intro: Scrophularia regelii, also known as Russian scrophularia or Regel's figwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Scrophularia regelii include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, Scrophularia regelii is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
